goal: 批次B：修复 Issue #4 (VideoContainer aiStatus 未使用) + Issue #8 (aiName 在 video_call 被忽略) + Issue #9 (硬编码 proxy URL)

coverage_checklist.video_container_no_aiStatus: assert: VideoContainer.tsx 不再声明 aiStatus prop
coverage_checklist.video_chat_no_aiStatus_prop: assert: VideoChat.tsx 不再向 VideoContainer 传入 aiStatus
coverage_checklist.ai_name_injected: assert: buildVideoCallPrompt 将 aiName 注入到提示词中（不直接返回常量）
coverage_checklist.proxy_url_configurable: assert: ai.ts 使用 VITE_PROXY_URL 环境变量替代硬编码 localhost:3000
coverage_checklist.typecheck_pass: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
